recommendations.title: Three from Prostokvashino
recommendations.overview: Little Fedor brings a cat to home despite his mother's distaste for cats. He runs away with his talking cat, to make more friends on the way.

recommendations.title: The Incredible Journey
recommendations.overview: The story of three pets, a cat and two dogs, who lose their owners when they are all on vacation. Can they find their way home?

recommendations.title: The Cat Returns
recommendations.overview: Young Haru rescues a cat from being run over, but soon learns it's no ordinary feline; it happens to be the Prince of the Cats.

recommendations.title: Flow
recommendations.overview: A solitary cat, displaced by a great flood, finds refuge on a boat with various species and must navigate the challenges of adapting to a transformed world together.

recommendations.title: Tarzan II
recommendations.overview: When one of his missteps puts his family in jeopardy, Tarzan decides they would be better off without him.

recommendations.title: Lorenzo
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, Fantasy, Music, Horror
recommendations.overview: A cat named Lorenzo is dismayed to discover that his tail has developed a personality of its own.

recommendations.title: Spirit Untamed
recommendations.overview: Lucky Prescott's life is changed forever when she moves from her home in the city to a small frontier town and befriends a wild mustang named Spirit.

recommendations.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
recommendations.overview: When Shaun decides to take the day off and have some fun, he gets a little more action than he bargained for. A mix up with the Farmer, a caravan and a very steep hill lead them all to the Big City and it's up to Shaun and the flock to return everyon

recommendations.title: Fireheart
recommendations.overview: The film explores the world of firefighters in 1920s New York City and tells the story of a 16-year-old girl who will have to become a hero in order to save her city.
recommendations.director: Laurent Zeitoun, Theodore Anthony Lee Ty

recommendations.title: Pets United
